title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Stryker India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Stryker India
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!
